title: Issue suppression comment should have the correct format
description: Suppression comments should follow a specific format to be effective.
message: Incorrect format for issue suppression comment
recommendation: Update suppression comments to the correct format

compliant.code:
sonar.py:sonar.py:# nocov erase
# nocov start
# nocov ignore <rule_id>
# nocov end

why_is_this_an_issue: Suppression comments help developers and maintainers to control which code analysis issues are reported. However, incorrectly formatted suppression comments can lead to false negatives or increased maintenance effort.
how_to_fix: Update the suppression comments to the correct format, as described in the SonarQube documentation.
function_code:
def check_issue_suppression_comment(node):
    if not node.get('value').startswith('# nocov erase
') or not any(f'# nocov {key}'.startswith(line) for key in ['start', 'ignore', 'end'] for line in node.get('value').split('
')):
        return True

metadata.title: Issue suppression comment should have the correct format
